name: Magic Origins

draft.notes: Land slot may instead hold a checklist card. Double-faced cards (5 mythic DFCs) replace the rare; when a DFC appears a checklist is also present. If a foil appears it displaces a common.

statedRates: double-faced cards seem to appear in ~1/25 of packs; checklist rate in non-DFC packs ~1/24 (2/25 total)
sourceNotes: Core set. 55 rares + 11 mythics slightly off normal large-set counts to accommodate the DFC sheet. Four basic land variations. Printed USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box.
